citations.title: Red Velvet Announces 2026 Fan-Con “A Day In Red & Velvet” Following August Comeback News | Soompi
citations.cited_text: Tickets will be available through Melon Ticket.

samples.text:
I'll search for Red Velvet upcoming events thoroughly using multiple reliable source types.
**VERDICT: EVENTS_FOUND**

---

**EVENTS:**

- **ARTIST:** Red Velvet
  **DATES:** August 1, 2026 (6:00 PM KST) & August 2, 2026 (4:00 PM KST)
  **VENUE:** Korea University Hwajeong Tiger Dome (Hwajeong Gymnasium)
  **CITY/COUNTRY:** Seoul, South Korea
  **SOURCE_CLASS:** reliable_media (Korea JoongAng Daily) + reliable_media (The Korea Times) + ticketing (Melon Ticket, referenced in both)
  **CITATION_URL:**
  - https://www.koreajoongangdaily.com/entertainment/girl-group-red-velvet-to-return-with-new-album-fan-concert-in-august/12723807
  - https://www.koreatimes.co.kr/entertainment/k-pop/20260616/red-velvet-sets-august-return-ending-2-year-wait-for-full-group-comeback
  - https://www.soompi.com/article/1847788wpp/red-velvet-announces-2026-fan-con-a-day-in-red-velvet-following-august-comeback-news

  **CITED TEXT:**
  - 
"2026 Red Velvet Fan-Con \<A Day in Red & Velvet\>" — "The fan concert will take place at the Tiger Dome gymnasium at Korea University in northern Seoul at 6 p.m. on Aug. 1 and at 4 p.m. on Aug. 2."

  - 
The Korea Times confirms: SM Entertainment "unveiled details Sunday for '2026 Red Velvet FAN-CON A Day in Red & Velvet,' a two-day event" and that "the fan concert will take place at Korea University's Hwajeong Gymnasium on Aug. 1 and Aug. 2."

  - 
Soompi reports: "The fan-con will take place at Korea University's Hwajeong Tiger Dome on August 1 at 6 p.m. KST and August 2 at 4 p.m. KST."

  - 
Tickets are available through Melon Ticket.


---

**REASON:** Red Velvet has a publicly announced, fully dated two-day fan-con — "2026 Red Velvet FAN-CON 'A Day in Red & Velvet'" — on August 1–2, 2026, at Korea University's Hwajeong Tiger Dome in Seoul, confirmed by multiple reliable Korean and international media outlets and tied to Melon Ticket sales.

citations.cited_text: Although no comeback dates have yet been announced, the new teaser promises that “ASSEMBLE 26 ‘LOVE&POP’” is “coming very soon.” Check out the new ann...

samples.text:
I'll search for tripleS concert and tour announcements now.
I need to check the official tripleS website and their Ticketmaster page for any upcoming events after July 15, 2026.
---

**VERDICT: NO_EVENTS_FOUND**

**EVENTS:** *(none)*

**REASON:** Across all qualifying sources checked — including Ticketmaster, Live Nation, SeatGeek, and the official tripleS website (triplescosmos.com) — no publicly announced tripleS concert, tour stop, or fan meeting with a specific date after 2026-07-15 was found. 
Ticketmaster explicitly states: "We're sorry, but we couldn't find any upcoming concerts for tripleS. Please check back soon."
 
SeatGeek similarly shows "There are no upcoming events for TripleS. Check back later for new event dates!"
 The only 2026 activity found from official/reliable media sources is the **ASSEMBLE26: LOVE&POP** music comeback project — 
tripleS announced two full-group comebacks for "LOVE&POP," with "LOVE side" promotions in the first half of 2026 and "POP side" promotions in the second half
 — but 
no comeback dates had yet been announced
, and a music release is not a live event. The Asia tour ("My Secret New Zone") referenced in fan wikis began in February 2026 and no future dated stops after July 15, 2026 were found from any qualifying source.

samples.text:
I'll search for PENTAGON concert and tour events announced after July 15, 2026.
The search results are clear and consistent. Here is the assessment:

---

**VERDICT: NO_EVENTS_FOUND**

**EVENTS:** *(none)*

**REASON:** No qualifying source — official artist/company, promoter, venue, ticketing platform, or reliable media — returned any announced PENTAGON concert, tour stop, or fan meeting with a confirmed date after July 15, 2026. 
Ticketmaster explicitly states "We're sorry, but we couldn't find any upcoming concerts for PENTAGON. Please check back soon."
 
An event aggregator (Festivaly.eu) similarly notes "There are no events planned but you can follow the artist. If a new event comes up, we'll let you know."
 The most recent confirmed group activity found was 
their appearance at the 33rd Hanteo Music Awards on February 15, 2026, where they performed as a group for the first time in nearly three years, performing "With Universe" and "Shine," and receiving Hanteo's 10th Anniversary Influential Artist award
 — which is prior to the July 15, 2026 cutoff date and is not a concert or fan meeting in any case.

citations.cited_text: Unfortunately there are no concert dates for N.Flying scheduled in 2026.

samples.text:
I'll search for N.Flying concert and tour announcements systematically, checking multiple reliable source types.
Now I have strong evidence. Let me assess each event against the cutoff date of **2026-07-15**:

- **Seoul fan meeting (March 21–22, 2026):** Already completed per the TenAsia wrap-up article (March 23, 2026). **Before cutoff — excluded.**
- **Taipei fan concert (April 11–12, 2026):** Already completed. **Before cutoff — excluded.**
- **Macau fan concert (May 9, 2026):** Confirmed by The Londoner Macao venue page. **Before cutoff — excluded.**

All confirmed events with specific dates fall **before** July 15, 2026. Ticketmaster (ticketing) and Live Nation (promoter) both show **no upcoming shows**. Songkick reports **no concert dates scheduled in 2026** beyond what has already passed. No qualifying event after July 15, 2026 was found from any official, promoter, venue, ticketing, or reliable media source.

---

**VERDICT:** NO_EVENTS_FOUND

**EVENTS:** *(none qualifying)*

**REASON:** All confirmed N.Flying events with specific dates in 2026 — the Seoul fan meeting (March 21–22), Taipei fan concert (April 11–12), and Macau fan concert (May 9) — fall before the July 15, 2026 cutoff and have already been completed; 
Ticketmaster reports no upcoming concerts for N.Flying
, 
Live Nation likewise lists no upcoming shows
, and 
Songkick confirms there are no concert dates for N.Flying scheduled in 2026
 beyond those already past.
